chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 656 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No.5541/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case. 22.11.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Leghari, Advocate for the Applicant >>>>>..<<<<< Heard learned Counsel for the applicant and perused the impugned order dated 31.10.2024 passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge, Mirwah, whereby the private respondents were granted pre-arrest bail. Perusal of impugned order reflects that bail was granted to the private respondents on the ground that there is dispute between the parties over plot; the offence for which the private respondents have been charged does not fall within the prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr.P.C. In such situation, no illegality or infirmity is found in the impugned order passed by the Additional Sessions Judge, Mirwah while granting pre-arrest bail to the private respondents. Resultantly, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application being devoid of merits is dismissed in limine along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI
